programme.title: Little Singham
programme.desc: Little Singham, an honest but ferocious police officer, fights against injustice.

programme.desc: Little Singham, an honest but ferocious police officer, fights against injustice. S01E48.

programme.desc: Titoo helps his mischievous monkey friend return home after the town complaints increase. S03 E19.

programme.title: Tickle Me Mandy-Haddi Mera Buddy
programme.desc: When Mandy goes away for the night, Billy annoys Grim into making a terrifying New Mandy.

programme.title: Little Singham
programme.desc: A Mexican armadillo's arrival in Mirichinagar leads to KK's evil transformation. S06E13.

programme.title: Little Singham
programme.desc: Khatarnaak Khatri's mutant formula falls prey to ravenous bookworms, causing mayhem. S06E14.

programme.title: Little Singham
programme.desc: Komal and Lattu join Little Singham on duty, but Dhatu Raja and Junglee Joker attack them. S06E15.

programme.desc: Simmba finds that Duggu Dumbbell has stolen money and gym equipment and goes to catch him. S03 E03.

programme.desc: When Micheal Money disguises as a reporter to commit a robbery, Simmba plans to stop him. S03 E12.

programme.desc: When Micheal Money disguises as a reporter to commit a robbery, Simmba plans to stop him. S03 E12.

programme.title: Cycle race Champ-Smaashhing Simmba
programme.desc: Simmba decides to take part in the annual cycle race and goes head-to-head with Tony. S03E10.

programme.title: Camp Mein Chori-Smaashhing Simmba
programme.desc: During a camping trip from school, Simmba and his friends face trouble from four bullies. S03 E09.

programme.title: Khel Mein Fail-Smaashhing Simmba
programme.desc: At the town fair, Aadha and Pauna rig the shooting game to cheat kids out of their money.

programme.title: Todd Do Yeh Deewar-Smaashhing Simmba
programme.desc: Simmba finds that Duggu Dumbbell has stolen money and gym equipment and goes to catch him. S03 E03.

programme.desc: When Micheal Money disguises as a reporter to commit a robbery, Simmba plans to stop him. S03 E12.

programme.title: Ek Aur Ek Gyarah-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo discovers the 3Bs gang's plot to rob Lucky Home Society and decides to stop them. S03E20.

programme.title: Crabby Cruise-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: After Kris wins a trip on a cruise, he asks his classmates to join him on this adventure.

programme.title: Gladiator Attack-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: While the children explore an old Roman museum, Kanishk joins forces with his vicious ally.

programme.title: Crabby Cruise-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: After Kris wins a trip on a cruise, he asks his classmates to join him on this adventure.

programme.title: Fitness Mantra-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose after Kanishk appoints Pinky as the new fitness coach.

programme.title: Egg Game-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Kanishk gives the children the task of protecting an egg in order to adopt a puppy.

programme.title: No Noise Day-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Frustrated by the loud sound of the school band, Kanishk introduces a no noise rule.

programme.title: Champ-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Everyone gears up for the table tennis tournament in order to win the coveted prize.

programme.title: Wipe Out-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Dr J terrorises the children by sending Dhulaisur when they get their clothes dirty.

programme.title: Papa Aur Secretary Ka Jhagda-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and his friends attempt to talk sense into the feuding elders and restore peace. S02 E05.

programme.title: Titoo Chori Ho Gaya-Titoo
programme.desc: Thieves steal Titoo's family car when he is fast asleep in it. S02 E06.

programme.title: Papa Ki Neend-Titoo
programme.desc: After Titoo's father falls ill from inhaling fumes, Titoo and Golu must work in his place. S02 E07.

programme.title: Parents Competition-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera and Titoo's friendly bet turns chaotic during a parents' sports day. S02 E08.

programme.title: Baal Baal Bache-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's neighbours face eviction by a group of swindlers, prompting him to help them. S02 E09.

programme.title: The Show Must Go On-Titoo
programme.desc: During the school's annual play, Shera hatches a plan to sabotage Golu's performance. S02 E10.

programme.title: Happy Children's Day-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and Golu plan a pizza feast for their neighbourhood, but Shera plans to ruin it. S02E11.

programme.title: Haunted House-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera's jealousy leads to a spooky prank on Titoo in a haunted house. S02E12.

programme.title: Cheater Shopkeeper-Titoo
programme.desc: Chacha's mismanagement of Gupta Ji's shop causes chaos, but Titoo steps in to help. S02E13.

programme.title: Titoo Superstar-Titoo
programme.desc: After his father tasks him with cleaning duty, Titoo fabricates a clever plan to evade it. S02E14.

programme.title: Titoo Kabootar-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo rescues an injured pigeon, but his parents decline to keep it. S02E15.

programme.title: Titoo Ka Report Card-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo frets over his poor marks and hatches a scheme to hide it from his parents. S02E16.

programme.title: Genie In A Bottle-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Jinky Fairy and Jintu Genie assume new identities and her wand grants wishes for everyone.

programme.title: Ticket To China-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Kris and his companions travel to China to observe the Spring Festival.

programme.title: The Powerful Diamonds-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Krish is a divine child sent to safeguard the children of the Mathura orphanage.

programme.title: Jhooth Bole Kauva Kaate-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Krish is a divine child sent to safeguard the children of the Mathura orphanage.

programme.title: Tt Sir Teetoo-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Krish is a divine child sent to safeguard the children of the Mathura orphanage.

programme.title: Botasur Ki Mahasafai-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Krish is a divine child sent to safeguard the children of the Mathura orphanage.

programme.title: Jugnu Ka Jhataak Attack-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Krish is a divine child sent to safeguard the children of the Mathura orphanage.

programme.title: Dimag Ki Batti Gul-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Krish is a divine child sent to safeguard the children of the Mathura orphanage.

programme.title: Bhoota Chacha-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Krish is a divine child sent to safeguard the children of the Mathura orphanage.

programme.title: Lions Of Punjab-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Krish is a divine child sent to safeguard the children of the Mathura orphanage.

programme.title: Cool Dracool In School-Kris Roll No 21
programme.desc: Krish is a divine child sent to safeguard the children of the Mathura orphanage.

programme.title: Bachchon Ka Comparison-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's antics derail his parents' misguided efforts to copy another family's routine. S02E17.

programme.title: Society Mein Election-Titoo
programme.desc: Shera plots to become the children's representative after Titoo's father wins an election. S02E18.

programme.title: Golu Bhaag Gaya-Titoo
programme.desc: After Golu stages his own kidnapping, Titoo takes charge to find him. S02E19.

programme.title: School Mein Gunde-Titoo
programme.desc: Three former students with a grudge take the teachers captive and begin to punish them. S02E20.

programme.title: Hot Air Balloon-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo and his society lose control of the balloon and work together to land safely. S10E18.

programme.title: Magical Clock-Titoo
programme.desc: Tito's parents become younger when they use a magical clock that takes them back in time.

programme.title: Hockey Championship-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's captaincy for the International Hockey Championship sparks Shera's jealousy. S02E21.

programme.title: Superhero Ki Cap-Titoo
programme.desc: Password bhai and his gang of con artists hatch a scheme to rob the town's bank. S02E22.

programme.title: Titoo Ke Dada Ji-Titoo
programme.desc: To evade trouble at school, Titoo hires an actor to impersonate his grandfather. S02E23.

programme.title: Papa Ki Health Report-Titoo
programme.desc: Concerned about his father's health, Titoo undertakes a mission to improve his lifestyle. S02E24.

programme.title: Titoo Watchman Ki Help-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo helps the society watchman, who urgently needs to visit his village. S03E18.

programme.title: Istri Competition-Titoo
programme.desc: When Istri Uncle struggles with his business, Titoo and Shera form a plan to help him. S03E21.

programme.title: Cooker Ki Siti-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S09 E01.

programme.title: Trained Madhumakhkhiyaan-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo, an eight-year-old boy, whose attempts at helping everyone always get him into trouble. S09 E02.

programme.title: Germs-Titoo
programme.desc: Tito tries to capture microbes in a test tube when they expand to enormous proportions. S09E03.

programme.title: Titoo Gaya Game Ke Ander-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo wants to go on an adventure trip, but soon he lands inside a video game.

programme.title: Ganna Ka Gift-Titoo
programme.desc: Titoo's kindness to an elderly woman backfires, leaving him giftless for Ganna's birthday. S02 E01.

programme.title: Secretary Memory Loss-Titoo
programme.desc: When the building secretary plays a game of cricket with Titoo, he suffers an accident. S02 E02.

programme.title: Papa Ka Laptop-Titoo
programme.desc: After breaking their father's laptop, Golu and Titoo scramble to mend it. S02 E03.

programme.title: Titoo Vs Shark-Titoo
programme.desc: At the aquarium waterpark, a jealous Shera isolates Titoo with rumours. S02 E04.

programme.desc: Titoo and his friends attempt to talk sense into the feuding elders and restore peace. S02 E05.

programme.desc: After Choocha has an adventure-filled dream, he slowly starts to lose his hair. S01 E33.
